Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}Well, the combat uniform seems to be working out. But what about that "Theurgy" thing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yamagishi, have you figured anything out on your end?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}I'm sorry, it's still unclear. I am picking something up during battle, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}There's no pressure. Just continue your observation.[n]{f 1 1}
